title: Wrenched
description: Standalone universal wrench mod using AnvilCraft`s wrench logic.
body:
# Wrenched

![Demonstration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e302fe83d6c5b5b9bcea6df0f1a875fbd462a2b.png)

Standalone universal wrench mod using AnvilCraft`s wrench logic.

## Usage

Use the wrench item on block to cycle between block states, hold use key and drag (or mouse wheel) then release to select one exactly state
